law.name: Law
description: ## Law
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/45}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abadar~Achaekek~Aesocar~Aksha~Akuma~Alichino~Alocer~Alseta~Amaznen~Andak~Andoletta~Angradd~Anubis~Apsu~Ardad Lili~Aroden~Aroggus~Arqueros~Asmodeus~Baalzebul~Barbariccia~Barbatos~Barravoclair~Belial~Bifrons~Bohga~Bundha~Caera~Cagnazzo~Calcabrina~Chugarra~Chupurvagasti~Circiatto~Crocell~Damerrich~Deumus~Dhalavei~Dispater~Doloras~Dradjit~Draghignazzo~Dranngvit~Eaqueo~Easivra~Eiseth~Eldas~Eligos~Erastil~Erecura~Falayna~Farfarello~Fharaas~Folgrit~Furcas~Gaap~Gavidya~General Susumu~Geryon~Ghenshau~Graffiacane~Gruhastha~Grundinnar~Haborym~Hadregash~Horus~Hudima~Hydim~Iaozrael~Imbrex~Inkariax~Inma~Iomedae~Ioramvol~Irori~Jerishall~Jiraviddain~Jyotah~Kaikyton~Kalma~Kelinahat~Kerkamoth~Kols~Kroina~Kunkarna~Libicocco~Lissala~Lissala (pre-Earthfall)~Lorcan~Lorthact~Losarkur~Lymnieris~Maat~Maeha~Magdh~Magrim~Mahathallah~Malacoda~Malthus~Mammon~Matravash~Mephistopheles~Minderhal~Moloch~Morrobahn~Mursha~Myr~Nergal~Neshen~Olheon~Onamahli~Ose~Osiris~Otikaya~Otolmens~Pirias~Prihasta~Psomeira~Quindiovatos~Ra~Raetorgash~Ragathiel~Rahu~Rasvocel~Ravana~Rubicante~Ruzel~Rytara~Sabnach~Scarmiglione~Shizuru~Sicva~Smiad~Sugroz~Surpa~Svarozic~Tanagaar~Taraksun~Thoth~Titivilus~Torag~Tsukiyo~Uruskreil~Uzumae~Valmallos~Vapula~Vevelor~Vibhishah~Vildeis~Vois~Wadjet~Winlas~Wylgart~Xhasnaphar~Yaezhing~Yan-gant-y-tan~Zabha~Zaebos~Zepar~Zohls~Zon-Kuthon~Zurapadyn~Zursvaater"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You follow a strict and ordered code of laws, and in so doing, achieve enlightenment.

::ab[Touch of Law (Sp):]{id=touch icon=boost standard="You can touch a willing creature, infusing it with the power of divine order and allowing it to treat all attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws for 1 round as if the natural d20 roll resulted in an 11." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Staff of Order (Su):]{l=8 id=staff icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the %%magic-enh/axiomatic%% special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8" useUnit=time}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="protection from chaos~align weapon|law only~magic circle against chaos~order's wrath~dispel chaos~hold monster~dictum~shield of law~summon monster IX|law spell only" save=domain}
::h3[Archon Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/86}
@HL[Associated Domains:] Good, Law

@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Aesocar~Andoletta~Angradd~Apsu~Arqueros~Damerrich~Easivra~Eldas~Erastil~Falayna~Folgrit~Ghenshau~Grundinnar~Iomedae~Kelinahat~Kroina~Lymnieris~Mazludeh~Myr~Neshen~Olheon~Osiris~Ragathiel~Shizuru~Smiad~Svarozic~Tanagaar~Torag~Tsukiyo~Vildeis~Wadjet~Winlas~Zohls"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [staff of order](#staff) power of the Law domain. {family/Archon/s} are a race of lawful good outsiders.

::ab[Aura of Menace (Su)]{l=8 icon=lower standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of menace. Enemies in this aura take a -2 penalty to AC and on attacks and saves as long as they remain inside the aura." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="divine favor" l3=prayer l6="planar ally|archon only"}
::h3[Devil Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/90}
@HL[Associated Domains:] Evil, Law

@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Achaekek~Alichino~Alocer~Ardad Lili~Asmodeus~Baalzebul~Barbariccia~Barbatos~Belial~Bifrons~Cagnazzo~Calcabrina~Circiatto~Crocell~Deumus~Dispater~Doloras~Draghignazzo~Eaqueo~Eiseth~Eligos~Farfarello~Furcas~Gaap~General Susumu~Geryon~Graffiacane~Haborym~Hadregash~Iaozrael~Jiraviddain~Kalma~Libicocco~Lissala~Lorcan~Lorthact~Losarkur~Mahathallah~Malacoda~Malthus~Mammon~Mephistopheles~Minderhal~Moloch~Nergal~Ose~Pirias~Quindiovatos~Rasvocel~Rubicante~Ruzel~Sabnach~Scarmiglione~Sicva~Titivilus~Uruskreil~Vapula~Vois~Wylgart~Xhasnaphar~Yaezhing~Yan-gant-y-tan~Zaebos~Zepar~Zon-Kuthon"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [touch of law](#touch) power of the Law domain. {family/Devil/s} are a race of lawful evil outsiders.

::ab[Hell's Corruption (Su)]{icon=touch ability="You can cause a creature to become more susceptible to corruption as a melee touch attack. Creatures touched take a -2 penalty on all saving throws and must roll all opposed skill checks twice, taking the worse result. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l3=suggestion l6="planar binding|devils only"}
::h3[Inevitable Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/92}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Alseta~Amaznen~Anubis~Dranngvit~Horus~Irori~Kols~Maat~Magrim~Ra~Thoth"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [touch of law](#touch) power of the Law domain. {family/Inevitable/s} are a race of lawful neutral outsiders.

::ab[Command (Su):]{icon=zap standard="You can give a creature an emotionless yet undeniable order, as per the spell %%spell/command%%. A Will save negates this effect. You cannot target a creature more than once per day with this ability." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="command undead" l5="greater command" l6="planar binding|inevitables only"}
::h3[Judgment Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Inner Sea Gods/226;Champions of Purity/21}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Damerrich~Maat~Neshen~Ragathiel~Zohls"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [touch of law](#touch) ability of the Law domain.

::ab[Chastisement (Su):]{icon=zap standard="You can cast a strengthened spell against a creature that damaged you since your last turn. This spell must target the creature that damaged you, and is cast at +1 caster level. Area of effect spells cannot be used in conjunction with this ability, but other spells that target multiple creatures may be." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=castigate l4=rebuke l5="mark of justice"}
::h3[Kyton Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Corruption/19}
@HL[Associated Domains:] Evil, Law
@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Zon-Kuthon"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [staff of order](#staff) ability of the Law domain.

::ab[Pain Is Power (Su)]{l=8 icon=def immediate="After taking damage from any source, you may attempt a DC 25 %%rule/concentration%% check. If you succeed, you gain the benefits of a %%spell/blessing of fervor%% spell for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level. If you fail, this ability is expended with no effect." useInc="4~cleric~8" useUnit=time}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="delay pain" l2="instrument of agony" l3=agonize l5="symbol of pain"}
::h3[Legislation Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Heroes of the Streets/19}
@HL[Associated Domains:] Law, Rune
@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Asmodeus~Dispater~Lissala~Winlas"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [touch of law](#touch) power of the Law domain.

::ab[Prohibition (Su):]{icon=zap standard="You can command a creature within 30 feet to refrain from committing a particular action (including any referenced in the spell *forbid action*). If the creature performs the named action before the beginning of your next turn, it takes 1d6 points of damage + 1 point for every 2 cleric levels you possess and the effect ends. This is a language-dependent effect." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="forbid action" l5="greater forbid action" l9="mass hold monster"}
::h3[Loyalty Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Inner Sea Gods/226;Blood of Angels/27}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Aesocar~Ghenshau~Grundinnar~Kols~Matravash~Sicva~Winlas"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [touch of law](#touch) power of the Law domain.

::ab[Touch of Loyalty (Su):]{icon=protect standard="As a standard action, you can touch a willing creature, granting it a +4 sacred bonus on saving throws to resist charm, compulsion, and fear effects for 1 hour." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="remove fear" l5="greater command"}
::h3[Slavery Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Inner Sea Gods/226;Goblins of Golarion/27}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Circiatto~Furcas~Gavidya~Hadregash~Inkariax~Jacarkas~Kalma~Lanishra~Losarkur~Vevelor~Zursvaater"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [staff of order](#staff) power of the Law domain.

::ab[Master's Yoke (Su):]{l=8 icon=zap standard="You can attempt to assert your dominance over any visible creature within 30 feet by declaring the target your property. The target can resist this effect with a successful Will save (DC = 10 + half your class level + your Wisdom modifier). If the target fails the save, it is affected as if by %%spell/dominate monster%% for a number of rounds equal to half your class level. The target can choose to ignore any order you give and instead take 2 points of %%rule/Constitution damage%% and become %%misc/staggered%% for 1 round. This is a language-based, mind-affecting effect." useInc="4~cleric~8" useUnit=time}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="charm person" l5="dominate person" l8=binding}
::h3[Sovereignty Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Heroes of the High Court/21}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Asmodeus~Dispater~Iomedae~Lissala~Zon-Kuthon"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [staff of order](#staff) power of the Law domain.

::ab[Demand Subjugation (Sp):]{l=8 icon=magic ability="You can force a defeated creature to accept a binding pact as a condition of its surrender, as if you are using %%spell/lesser geas%%, except the creature must have a number of Hit Dice equal to or less than your cleric level." useMod3=Wis imp="16~The ability functions as per %%spell/geas//quest%%."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=castigate l5="mass castigate" l9="overwhelming presence"}
::h3[Tyranny Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Blood of Fiends/15;Inner Sea Gods/227}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Aksha~Aroggus~Bohga~Bundha~Caera~Dispater~Dradjit~Eligos~Hudima~Inma~Jyotah~Kaikyton~Kunkarna~Lanishra~Malacoda~Mursha~Otikaya~Prihasta~Ravana~Sicva~Surpa~Uruskreil~Vibhishah~Wylgart~Zabha~Zursvaater"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [staff of order](#staff) power of the Law domain.

::ab[Tyrannical Strike (Su):]{l=8 icon=melee immediate="Upon successfully landing a melee attack on an opponent, you can choose to forgo the damage (but not any other effects of the attack) to instead affect the creature you hit as per a %%spell/greater command%% spell, with a caster level equal to your class level." useInc="4~cleric~8" useUnit=time}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l3="bestow curse" l7="symbol of persuasion"}

legislation.name: Legislation
description: ## Legislation
This subdomain is associated with both the {domain/Law} and {domain/Rune} domains.

liberation.name: Liberation
description: ## Liberation
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/45}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Anogetz~Arshea~Black Butterfly~Desna~Eaqueo~Falayna~Feronia~Kazutal~Khepri~Llamolaek~Lorris~Milani~Mneoc~Narriseminek~Neshen~Ondisso~Saloc~Scal~Shei~Ssila'meshnik~Sun Wukong~Taraksun~Vapula~Vevelor~Xhasnaphar~Zaigasnar"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You are a spirit of freedom and a staunch foe against all who would enslave and oppress.

::ab[Liberation (Su):]{id=lib icon=boost passive="You have the ability to ignore impediments to your mobility. For as long as you have rounds available, you can move normally regardless of magical effects that impede movement, as if you were affected by %%spell/freedom of movement%%. This effect occurs automatically as soon as it applies." useL=cleric useNC}

::ab[Freedom's Call (Su):]{id=free l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of freedom. Allies within this aura are not affected by the %%misc/confused%%, %%rule/grappled,/ pinned%%, %%misc/frightened%%, %%misc/panicked%%, %%rule/paralyzed%%, or %%misc/shaken%% conditions. This aura only suppresses these effects, and they return once a creature leaves the aura or when the aura ends, if applicable." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="remove fear~remove paralysis~remove curse~freedom of movement~break enchantment~greater dispel magic~refuge~mind blank~freedom" save=domain}
::h3[Freedom Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/91}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Arshea~Black Butterfly~Desna~Eaqueo~Falayna~Feronia~Khepri~Llamolaek~Lorris~Milani~Neshen~Scal~Shei~Sun Wukong~Taraksun~Vevelor~Xhasnaphar~Zaigasnar"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [liberation](#lib) power of the Liberation domain.

::ab[Liberty's Blessing (Sp):]{icon=aid standard="You touch a willing creature as a standard action, granting it a boon. A creature with this boon can, as a swift action, make a saving throw against a single spell or effect it is suffering from that grants a save. The DC of the saving throw is equal to the original DC of the spell or effect. If the saving throw is successful, the effect ends. This boon lasts for 1 minute or until successfully used to remove a spell or effect, whichever duration is shorter." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=sanctuary l5="plane shift"}
::h3[Revolution Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/96}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Anogetz~Black Butterfly~Desna~Falayna~Khepri~Milani~Sun Wukong~Taraksun~Vevelor~Xhasnaphar"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the freedom's call power of the Liberation domain.
::ab[Powerful Persuader (Su):]{l=8 icon=power free="When you make a Diplomacy or Intimidate check, you can roll twice and take the higher result." useInc="2~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=enthrall l6="symbol of persuasion"}
::h3[Self-Realization Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/26}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
@HL[Associated Domains:] Liberation, Strength
@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Arshea~Falayna~Haagenti~Irori~Kurgess~Scal~Shei~Urgathoa"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [liberation](#lib) power of the Liberation domain.

::ab[Perfected Form (Su):]{icon=def passive="You maintain an unshakable sense of who you are, and no force can compel you to be anything else. You gain a +1 sacred (if your patron is good or neutral) or profane (if your patron is evil) bonus on saving throws against polymorph, petrification, and transmutation effects. This bonus increases by 1 for every 5 cleric levels you have (maximum +5). Once per day when you succeed at a saving throw against such an effect, you can gain a surge of self-confidence as an immediate action that grants you a number of %%rule/temporary hit points%% equal to your cleric level and a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws; both effects last for 1 minute."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="paragon surge|always matches your actual race" l6="primal scream" l7=transformation}

self_realization.name: Self-Realization
description: ## Self-Realization
This subdomain is associated with both the {domain/Liberation} and {domain/Strength} domains.

luck.name: Luck
description: ## Luck
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/45}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Andirifkhu~Atropos~Bes~Calistria~Chadali~Chaldira~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Dachzerul~Dammar~Desna~Graffiacane~Grandmother Spider~Halcamora~Hembad~Imot~Irez~Kofusachi~Kurgess~Lalaci~Lao Shu Po~Magdh~Nivi Rhombodazzle~Raetorgash~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Sinashakti~Uaransaph~Yabu"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You are infused with luck, and your mere presence can spread good fortune.

::ab[Bit of Luck (Sp):]{id=bit icon=aid standard="You can touch a willing creature, giving it a bit of luck. For the next round, any time the target rolls a d20, he may roll twice and take the more favorable result." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Good Fortune (Ex):]{id=good l=6 icon=boost immediate="You can reroll any one d20 roll that you have just made before the results of the roll are revealed. You must take the result of the reroll, even if it's worse than the original roll." useInc="6~cleric~6"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="true strike~aid~protection from energy~freedom of movement~break enchantment~mislead~spell turning~moment of prescience~miracle" save=domain}
::h3[Curse Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/88}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Andirifkhu~Calistria~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Dachzerul~Desna~Graffiacane~Lao Shu Po~Magdh~Raetorgash~Yabu"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [bit of luck](#bit) power of the Luck domain.

::ab[Malign Eye (Su):]{icon=zap standard="You can afflict one target within 30 feet with your malign eye, causing it to take a -2 penalty on all saving throws against your spells. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until the target hits you with an attack." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=bane l3="bestow curse" l6=eyebite}
::h3[Fate Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/90}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Chadali~Chaldira~Desna~Hembad~Irez~Kofusachi~Kurgess~Lalaci~Magdh~Nivi Rhombodazzle~Raetorgash~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Sinashakti~Uaransaph"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [good fortune](#good) power of the Luck domain.

::ab[Tugging Strands (Su):]{l=8 icon=zap ability="You can force a creature within line of sight to reroll any one roll that it has just made before the result of the roll is revealed. The result of the reroll must be taken, even if it is worse than the original roll." useInc="6~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=augury l3="borrow fortune"}
::h3[Imagination Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Purity/21}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Bes"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [good fortune](#good) ability of the Luck domain.

::ab[Haze of Daydreams (Su):]{l=6 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 15-foot-radius haze of daydreams. Creatures within the haze gain the %%misc/fascinated%% condition unless they succeed at a Will save (DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). You may designate a number of creatures equal to your cleric level that are not affected by the haze. The fascinated condition ends immediately when the creatures leave the area or the aura expires." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="silent image" l2="minor image" l3="major image" l5=dream}

madness.name: Madness
description: ## Madness
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/45}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abhoth~Ajids~Alichino~Atlach-Nacha~Azathoth~Calcabrina~Charg~Chucaro~Cthulhu~Eaqueo~Ghatanothoa~Groetus~Gyronna~Haggakal~Hastrikhal~Hydim~Laivatiniel~Lamashtu~Narriseminek~Onamahli~Ose~Osolmyr~Ozranvial~Pirias~Set~Shivaska~Shyka~Sifkesh~Sivanah~Speakers of the Depths~Taraksun~The Lantern King~The Lost Prince~Trelmarixian~Tsukiyo~Zura"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You embrace the madness that lurks deep in your heart, and can unleash it to drive your foes insane or to sacrifice certain abilities to hone others.

::ab[Vision of Madness (Sp):]{id=vis icon=touch ability="You can give a creature a vision of madness as a melee touch attack. Choose one of the following: attack rolls, saving throws, or skill checks. The target receives a bonus to the chosen rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) and a penalty to the other two types of rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum -1). This effect fades after 3 rounds." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Aura of Madness (Su):]{id=aura l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of madness. Enemies within this aura are affected by %%spell/confusion%% unless they make a Will save with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier. The confusion effect ends immediately when the creature leaves the area or the aura expires. Creatures that succeed on their saving throw are immune to this aura for 24 hours." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="lesser confusion~touch of idiocy~rage~confusion~nightmare~phantasmal killer~insanity~scintillating pattern~weird" save=domain}
::h3[Insanity Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/92}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abhoth~Ajids~Alichino~Azathoth~Calcabrina~Chucaro~Cthulhu~Eaqueo~Ghatanothoa~Groetus~Gyronna~Hydim~Laivatiniel~Lamashtu~Onamahli~Ose~Osolmyr~Pirias~Shivaska~Shyka~Sivanah~Speakers of the Depths~Taraksun~The Lost Prince~Trelmarixian~Tsukiyo"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [vision of madness](#vis) power of the Madness domain.

::ab[Insane Focus (Su):]{icon=protect standard="You can touch a willing creature, granting it a +4 bonus on all saving throws made against mind-affecting effects and immunity to confusion. This bonus lasts for 1 minute. If the creature fails a saving throw against a mind-affecting effect during this period, it loses its immunity to confusion and is immediately %%misc/confused%% for one round." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4=moonstruck l6="phantasmal web"}
::h3[Nightmare Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/94}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abhoth~Atlach-Nacha~Azathoth~Calcabrina~Charg~Cthulhu~Eaqueo~Geon~Ghatanothoa~Gyronna~Haggakal~Hydim~Lamashtu~Onamahli~Ose~Ozranvial~Pirias~Set~Shivaska~Sifkesh~Taraksun"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [vision of madness](#vis) power of the Madness domain.

::ab[Fearful Touch (Su):]{icon=touch standard="You can make a melee touch attack against a creature, causing it to experience terrible hallucinations for 1 round. During this time, the creature loses any immunity to fear effects it might possess and takes a -2 penalty on attack rolls made against you. In addition, the creature takes a penalty on Will saves made against fear effects equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum -1). This power is a mind-affecting effect." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="phantasmal killer" l6="cloak of dreams" l9=weird}
::h3[Truth Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/27}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Groetus~Lamashtu~Sifkesh~Sivanah"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [aura of madness](#aura) power of the Madness domain.

::ab[Dawning Realization (Su):]{l=8 icon=touch standard="You can impart a shared vision of unfathomable ineffability to a living creature you touch, after which your turn immediately ends. You are %%misc/dazed%% and the target %%misc/confused%% for 1 round by what you both learn. On the following round, you are both %%misc/staggered%% for 1 round by the ramifications of your discovery. On the third round, you are confused and the target dazed for 1 round as you attempt to regain your bearings. Each round, the target can attempt a Will save with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier to negate that round's effects for both of you, though the effect does not end until the end of the third round. This is a mind-affecting effect." useInc="2~cleric"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="wall of nausea" l5="contact other plane" l6="litany of madness"}

magic.name: Magic
description: ## Magic
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/46}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abraxas~Aerekostes~Aesdurath~Alseta~Amaznen~Asmodeus~Barbatos~Chamiaholom~Chucaro~Circiatto~Irez~Isis~Korada~Kroina~Lorthact~Nalinivati~Narakaas~Nethys~Ng~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Orcus~Qi Zhong~Sezelrian~Shiggarreb~Shyka~Sivanah~Skrymir~Slandrais~Teshallas~Thoth~Tsathoggua~Urgathoa~Valmallos~Vorasha~Yuelral"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You are a true student of all things mystical, and see divinity in the purity of magic.

::ab[Hand of the Acolyte (Su):]{id=hand icon=zap standard="You can cause your melee weapon to fly from your grasp and strike a foe before instantly returning. You can make a single attack using a melee weapon at a range of 30 feet. This attack is treated as a ranged attack with a thrown weapon, except that you add your Wisdom modifier to the attack roll instead of your Dexterity modifier (damage still relies on Strength). This ability cannot be used to perform a combat maneuver." useMod3=Wis}
::ab[Dispelling Touch (Sp):]{l=8 icon=touch standard="You can use a targeted %%spell/dispel magic%% effect as a melee touch attack." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="identify~magic mouth~dispel magic~imbue with spell ability~spell resistance~antimagic field~spell turning~protection from spells~mage's disjunction" save=domain}
::h3[Alchemy Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/22}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
@HL[Associated Domains:] Artifice, Magic
@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Brigh~Haagenti~Norgorber~Orgesh~Qi Zhong"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [hand of the acolyte](#hand) power of the Magic domain.

::ab[Divine Alchemy (Su):]{icon=magic ability="You can perform a 1-minute ritual that infuses a flask of water with one of your prepared spells, creating an improvised potion that lasts until consumed or the next time you prepare spells. You can use this ability only with spells that target one or more creatures, and the maximum spell level you can infuse in this way is equal to 1 + 1 for every 4 cleric levels you have. These potions are treated as %%class/alchemist%% extracts for the purpose of your domain spells." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="touch injection" l4="amplify elixir" l6="delayed consumption"}
::h3[Arcane Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/86}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abraxas~Aerekostes~Aesdurath~Alseta~Amaznen~Asmodeus~Barbatos~Isis~Lorthact~Nalinivati~Nethys~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Shiggarreb~Shyka~Thoth~Tsathoggua~Yuelral"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [hand of the acolyte](#hand) power of the Magic domain.

::ab[Arcane Beacon (Su):]{icon=aura standard="You can become a beacon of arcane energy until the end of your next turn. The aura emanates 15 feet from you. All arcane spells cast within the aura either gain a +1 bonus to their caster level or increase their saving throw DC by +1. The caster chooses the benefit when she casts the spell." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="magic aura" l4="arcane eye" l6="analyze dweomer"}
::h3[Divine Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/90}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Aesdurath~Amaznen~Asmodeus~Barbatos~Isis~Korada~Kroina~Nalinivati~Nethys~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Orcus~Qi Zhong~Sezelrian~Shyka~Skrymir~Tsathoggua~Urgathoa~Yuelral"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [hand of the acolyte](#hand) power of the Magic domain.

::ab[Divine Vessel (Su):]{icon=boost swift="Whenever you are the target of a divine spell, you can grant each ally within 15 feet of you a divine boon. This boon grants a +2 bonus on the next attack roll, skill check, or ability check made before the end of their next turn." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="bless water" l5=cleanse l7=resurrection l9=miracle}
::h3[Rites Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/26}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abraxas~Asmodeus~Nalinivati~Nethys~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Sivanah"}

@HL[Replacement Power:] When casting a Rites domain spell with a costly material component - or casting *permanency* on any domain spell - reduce the cost of the necessary components by 20%. The following granted power replaces the [hand of the acolyte](#hand) power of the Magic domain.

::ab[Enduring Ritual (Su):]{icon=magic swift="When you cast a spell with a duration of at least 1 minute per caster level, you can increase the spell's effective caster level by 1 for the purpose of determining its duration and preventing attempts to dispel it." useMod3=Wis imp="10~The effective caster level increases by 2.~~20~The effective caster level increases by 3."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="sanctify corpse" l5=permanency l8=binding}

nobility.name: Nobility
description: ## Nobility
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/46}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abadar~Arazni~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Count Ranalc~Dispater~Erecura~Eritrice~Folgrit~General Susumu~Horus~Inma~Jacarkas~Kols~Lanishra~Lissala~Lissala (pre-Earthfall)~Losarkur~Myr~Naderi~Nalinivati~Nameless~Olheon~Omrataji~Ragathiel~Ruapceras~Seramaydiel~Shamira~Shax~Sicva~Smiad~Sugroz~Thamir Gixx~The Lost Prince~Trudd~Vale~Ydersius~Zaebos"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You are a great leader, an inspiration to all who follow the teachings of your faith.

::ab[Inspiring Word (Sp):]{id=word icon=aid standard="You can speak an inspiring word to a creature within 30 feet. That creature receives a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Leadership (Ex):]{id=lead l=8 icon=power ability="You receive %%feat/Leadership%% as a bonus feat. In addition, you gain a +2 bonus on your leadership score as long as you uphold the tenets of your deity (or divine concept if you do not venerate a deity)."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="divine favor~enthrall~magic vestment~discern lies~greater command~geas//quest~repulsion~demand~storm of vengeance" save=domain}
::h3[Aristocracy Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Balance/16}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Nalinivati"}
@HL[Replacement Powers:] The following granted powers replace the [inspiring word](#word) ability of the Nobility domain.

::ab[Noble Visage-Bonus (Su):]{icon=boost passive="You gain a +1 bonus on Charisma checks and Charisma-based skill checks against creatures that share your creature type (and subtype, if you are a humanoid). This bonus increases by 1 for every 5 levels you possess." imp="5~The bonus becomes +2.~~10~The bonus becomes +32.~~15~The bonus becomes +4.~~20~The bonus becomes +5."}

::ab[Noble Visage-Touch (Su):]{icon=protect standard="You can touch an ally to grant her your noble visage bonus against creatures that share her creature type (or subtype) for 1 minute. When you use this ability, you lose your noble visage bonus for 1 minute." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="enter image" l9="overwhelming presence"}
::h3[Hubris Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/23}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
@HL[Associated Domains:] Glory, Nobility
@list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Dispater~General Susumu~Iomedae~Jaidz~Lissala~Olheon~Ydersius"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [leadership](#lead) power of the Nobility domain.

::ab[Divine Demand (Su)]{l=6 icon=boost swift="You can petition your divine patron for far greater power than you deserve. This ability can be used only as you cast a spell that has a reduced (but not negated) effect on a successful save. The saving throw DC of the spell increases by 2, and you gain a +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance with the spell. Any creature that succeeds at the saving throw instead avoids the effect entirely. If half or more of the targets are unaffected, you become %%misc/shaken%% for a number of rounds equal to the spell's level. If all of the targets are unaffected, you instead lose the ability to cast divine spells, channel energy, and use domain powers for 1d4+1 rounds; you can end this loss as a full-round action by loudly apologizing to your patron deity as a full-round action that provokes attacks of opportunity." useInc="4~cleric~6"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="hollow heroism" l7="greater hollow heroism" l9="overwhelming presence" extra="If you are evil, replace the domain spells *bless weapon* and *holy aura* with *aid* and *unholy aura* respectively."}
::h3[Leadership Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/92}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Arazni~Dispater~Erecura~Eritrice~General Susumu~Horus~Inma~Jacarkas~Kols~Lissala~Lissala (pre-Earthfall)~Myr~Nalinivati~Olheon~Omrataji~Ra~Ruapceras~Seramaydiel~Shamira~Shax~Sicva~Sugroz~Thamir Gixx~Ydersius~Zaebos"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [inspiring word](#word) power of the Nobility domain.

::ab[Inspiring Command (Su):]{icon=boost standard="You can issue an inspiring command to your allies. The inspiring command affects one ally plus one additional ally for every three cleric levels you possess, who must all be within 30 feet of you. Affected allies gain a +2 insight bonus on attack rolls, AC, combat maneuver defense, and skill checks for 1 round. This is a language-dependant mind-affecting effect."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=bless l3=prayer l6="brilliant inspiration"}
::h3[Martyr Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/93}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chinostes (Good Aspect)~Count Ranalc~Folgrit~Naderi~Olheon~Ragathiel~Shax~Smiad~Sugroz~The Lost Prince~Trudd~Vildeis~Ydersius~Zaebos"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [leadership](#lead) power of the Nobility domain.

::ab[Sacrificial Bond (Su):]{l=8 icon=protect immediate="When an ally within 30 feet takes damage from an attack, you can transfer this damage to yourself. This power also transfers any effects that accompany the damage. The damage done to you cannot be reduced in any way." useInc="6~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="shield other" l6="sacrificial oath"}
::h3[Variant Domain Powers]{jl}
{SOURCE Haunted Heroes Handbook}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.
#### Naderi
{SOURCE Haunted Heroes Handbook/9}

As worshipers of the goddess of drowning, romantic tragedy, and suicide, {faith/Naderi/'s} faithful are often fraught with encounters of the supernatural variety. Her followers contend more with undead than they do outsiders or magical possession, more as a matter of her portfolio than because of any actual training against such forces. Her divine worshipers use conventional means of defeating haunts or possessing spirits, but have additional power over those tied to means of death in Naderi's portfolio.

::ab[Romance Beyond Death (Su):]{icon=aura passive="You receive %%feat/Command Undead%% or %%feat/Turn Undead%% as a bonus feat, depending on the type of energy you channel. Increase the DC of the saving throw against these feats' effects by 2 as long as the spirits involved were slain by drowning or killed themselves. If the circumstances of the affected undead's creation was linked to romance, increase the save DC by 4 instead."}
This replaces the [leadership](#lead) domain power of the Nobility domain.

plant.name: Plant
description: ## Plant
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/46}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Angazhan~Barbariccia~Cernunnos~Cyth-V'sug~Daikitsu~Diceid~Erastil~Fandarra~Furcas~Gozreh~Green Faith~Halcamora~Il'surrish~Immonhiel~Jaidi~Kelksiomides~Ketephys~Lady Nanbyo~Nhimbaloth~Oaur-Ooung~Osiris~Pirias~Shub-Niggurath~Tamede~The Green Mother~Treerazer~Vermilion Mother~Xhamen-Dor~Zyphus"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You find solace in the green, can grow defensive thorns, and can communicate with plants.

::ab[Wooden Fist (Su):]{id=fist icon=melee free="Your hands can become as hard as wood, covered in tiny thorns. While you have wooden fists, your unarmed strikes do not provoke attacks of opportunity, deal lethal damage, and gain a bonus on damage rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1)." useMod3=Wis useUnit=round useNC}

::ab[Bramble Armor (Su):]{id=armor l=6 icon=def free="You can cause a host of wooden thorns to burst from your skin. While bramble armor is in effect, any foe striking you with an unarmed strike or a melee weapon without reach takes 1d6 points of piercing damage + 1 point per two cleric levels you possess." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="entangle~barkskin~plant growth~command plants~wall of thorns~repel wood~animate plants~control plants~shambler" save=domain}
::h3[Decay Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/88}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Angazhan~Cyth-V'sug~Gozreh~Lady Nanbyo~Nhimbaloth~Oaur-Ooung~Shub-Niggurath~Tamede~The Green Mother~Treerazer~Trelmarixian~Vermilion Mother~Vorasha~Xhamen-Dor~Zyphus"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [bramble armor](#armor) power of the Plant domain.

::ab[Aura of Decay (Su):]{l=8 icon=lower standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of decay. Living creatures in this aura (except you) take 1d6 points of damage per round as their flesh rots. They also take a cumulative -1 penalty to Strength each round they remain in the aura. Once outside the aura, the penalty fades at the rate of -1 per round, but it begins building again if they reenter the aura. Plant creatures take 2d6 points of damage per round." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3=contagion l4=poison l6=harm}
::h3[Growth Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/91}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Angazhan~Barbariccia~Cernunnos~Cyth-V'sug~Daikitsu~Erastil~Fandarra~Furcas~Gozreh~Halcamora~Immonhiel~Jaidi~Ketephys~Oaur-Ooung~Osiris~Pirias~Shub-Niggurath~Tamede~The Green Mother~Valani~Vermilion Mother"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [wooden fist](#fist) power of the Plant domain.
::ab[Enlarge (Su):]{icon=boost swift="You can enlarge yourself for 1 round, as if you were the target of the *enlarge person* spell." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="enlarge person" l5="righteous might"}
::h3[Leshy Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/23}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Gozreh~Green Faith"}
@HL[Replacement Powers:] The following granted powers replace the [wooden fist](#fist) power of the Plant domain.

::ab[Leshy Caller-Spells (Sp):]{icon=magic passive="You can spontaneously swap out any of your domain spells for a *summon nature's ally* spell of the same level or lower, to a maximum of %%spell/summon nature's ally VII%%. If you do, you must use the spell to summon one or more %%family/leshy/s%%. Add %%monster/leaf leshy%%, %%monster/gourd leshy%%, %%monster/fungus leshy%%, %%monster/seaweed leshy%%, and %%monster/lotus leshy%% to your *summon nature's ally I, II, III, IV,* and *V* lists, respectively. You count as a plant creature for the purpose of creating leshys."}
::ab[Leshy Caller-Bonus (Sp):]{icon=boost standard="You can grant a single leshy within 30 feet a +4 sacred bonus on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="tree shape" l5="commune with nature"}
::h3[Thorns Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/26}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Shub-Niggurath~The Green Mother~Zyphus"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [wooden fist](#fist) power of the Plant domain.

::ab[Cruel Thicket (Su):]{icon=magic standard="You can cause the ground in a 5-foot-radius %%misc/burst%% centered on you to sprout twisting, thorny vines. Any creature moving through it must travel at half speed or take %%rule/bleed%% damage equal to half your cleric level; if you activate this ability in an area with numerous plants (grass, weeds, trees, etc.), the area also becomes %%rule/difficult terrain%%. These effects last for 1 minute, after which the vines crumble to dust. Creatures able to move through natural undergrowth unhindered ignore the effects of this ability." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="thorn javelin" l3="thorny entanglement" l4="thorn body"}

protection.name: Protection
description: ## Protection
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/46}

::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abadar~Acavna~Aesocar~Alseta~Amaznen~Andoletta~Anubis~Arazni~Aroden~Aroggus~Arqueros~Ashukharma~Barzahk~Bastet~Bes~Bohga~Ceyannan~Chadali~Cihua Couatl~Dalenydra~Dammar~Dretha~Feronia~Grundinnar~Haborym~Iggeret~Jaidz~Kazutal~Korada~Lorris~Lymnieris~Maat~Milani~Nephthys~Nethys~Olheon~Ondisso~Qi Zhong~Rowdrosh~Selket~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Soralyon~Torag~Trudd~Upion and Warrik~Vavaalrav~Wadjet~Winlas~Wylgart~Xhasnaphar~Yamatsumi~Yig"}

@HL[Granted Powers:] Your faith is your greatest source of protection, and you can use that faith to defend others. In addition, you receive a +1 resistance bonus on saving throws. This bonus increases by 1 for every 5 levels you possess.

::ab[Resistant Touch (Sp):]{id=touch icon=protect standard="You can touch an ally to grant him your resistance bonus for 1 minute. When you use this ability, you lose your resistance bonus granted by the Protection domain for 1 minute." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Aura of Protection (Su):]{id=protect l=8 icon=protect standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of protection. You and your allies within this aura gain a +1 deflection bonus to AC and %%umr/resistance%% 5 against all elements (acid, cold, electricity, fire, and sonic)." useL=cleric useNC imp="12~The deflection bonus increases to +2.~~14~The elemental resistance increases to 10.~~16~The deflection bonus increases to +3.~~20~The deflection bonus increases to +4."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="sanctuary~shield other~protection from energy~spell immunity~spell resistance~antimagic field~repulsion~mind blank~prismatic sphere" save=domain}
::h3[Defense Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/89}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Acavna~Alseta~Amaznen~Andoletta~Anubis~Arazni~Aroggus~Arqueros~Ashukharma~Bastet~Bes~Bohga~Chadali~Cihua Couatl~Dalenydra~Dretha~Grundinnar~Haborym~Jaidz~Korada~Lorris~Milani~Nephthys~Nethys~Olheon~Ondisso~Rowdrosh~Selket~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Soralyon~Torag~Trudd~Wadjet~Winlas~Wylgart~Yamatsumi~Yig"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [resistant touch](#touch) power of the Protection domain.

::ab[Deflection Aura (Su):]{icon=protect standard="Once each day, you can emit a 20-foot aura for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. Allies within the aura gain a +2 deflection bonus to AC and combat maneuver defense."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=shield l2=barkskin l7=deflection}
::h3[Fortifications Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Heroes of the Streets/18}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abadar~Arqueros~Torag"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [resistant touch](#touch) power of the Protection domain.

::ab[Sheltering Walls (Sp):]{icon=protect standard="You can touch an ally to summon a floating blockade of stone, granting the ally the benefits of partial %%rule/cover%% for 1 round. This ability does not grant the ally enough cover to attempt a Stealth check or avoid provoking attacks of opportunity. If the ally benefits from any other form of cover against an attack, the bonuses to AC and on Reflex saving throws increase by 1." useMod3=Wis imp="6~The cover lasts for 2 rounds.~~12~The cover lasts for 3 rounds.~~18~The cover lasts for 4 rounds."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="hold portal" l5="wall of stone" l9="prismatic wall"}
::h3[Purity Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/94}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Aesocar~Andoletta~Anubis~Chadali~Jaidz~Lymnieris~Maat~Milani~Nephthys~Ondisso~Qi Zhong~Selket~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Soralyon~Wadjet~Winlas"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [aura of protection](#aura) power of the Protection domain.

::ab[Purifying Touch (Su):]{l=8 icon=aid standard="You can touch a willing creature with divine power, giving it a saving throw against each effect currently affecting it, using the original saving throw DC of the effect. Each successful saving throw ends the related effect. The creature can choose not to make a save against an effect." useInc="6~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="protection from chaos//evil//good//law" l3="remove blindness//deafness" l5=atonement}
::h3[Solitude Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Balance/17}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Nethys~Yamatsumi"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] The following granted power replaces the [resistant touch](#touch) ability of the Protection domain.

::ab[Taboo (Su):]{icon=lower immediate="When a creature touches you or strikes you with a melee attack, you can activate this power. That creature takes a -1 penalty on saving throws for 1 minute. This penalty increases by 1 for every 5 levels you possess. When you use this ability, you lose your resistance bonus granted by the Protection domain for 1 minute." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=silence l4="detect scrying" l5="mirage arcana" l9="greater create demiplane"}

repose.name: Repose
description: ## Repose
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/46}

**Deities:** {faith/Acavna}, {faith/Alazhra}, {faith/Anubis}, {faith/Ashava}, {faith/Atropos}, {faith/Barzahk}, {faith/Ceyannan}, {faith/Chamiaholom}, {faith/Chavazvug}, {faith/Corosbel}, {faith/Dalenydra}, {faith/Dammar}, {faith/Doloras}, {faith/Fharaas}, {faith/Fumeiyoshi}, {faith/Ghenshau}, {faith/Imot}, {faith/Lorcan}, {faith/Magrim}, {faith/Mother Vulture}, {faith/Mrtyu}, {faith/Naderi}, {faith/Narakaas}, {faith/Osiris}, {faith/Ozranvial}, {faith/Pharasma}, {faith/Phlegyas}, {faith/Rhan-Tegoth}, {faith/Saloc}, {faith/Selket}, {faith/Shizuru}, {faith/Teshallas}, {faith/The Lost Prince}, {faith/The Pale Horse}, {faith/Tsukiyo}, {faith/Uskyeria}, {faith/Vale}, {faith/Vavaalrav}, {faith/Vonymos}, {faith/Yhidothrus}
**Granted Powers:** You see death not as something to be feared, but as a final rest and reward for a life well spent. The taint of undeath is a mockery of what you hold dear.

**Gentle Rest (Sp):** Your touch can fill a creature with lethargy, causing a living creature to become {misc/staggered} for 1 round as a melee touch attack. If you touch a staggered living creature, that creature falls asleep for 1 round instead. Undead creatures touched are staggered for a number of rounds equal to your Wisdom modifier. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.

**Ward Against Death (Su):** At 8th level, you can emit a 30-foot aura that wards against death for a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. Living creatures in this area are immune to all death effects, energy drain, and effects that cause negative levels. This ward does not remove negative levels that a creature has already gained, but the negative levels have no effect while the creature is inside the warded area. These rounds do not need to be consecutive.

**Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/deathwatch}, 2nd-{spell/gentle repose}, 3rd-{spell/speak with dead}, 4th-{spell/death ward}, 5th-{spell/slay living}, 6th-{spell/undeath to death}, 7th-{spell/destruction}, 8th-{spell/waves of exhaustion}, 9th-{spell/wail of the banshee}.
::h3[Pharasma-Friendly Repose Domain]{jl}
{SOURCE Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains}
This adjustment makes the Repose domain more in line with {faith/Pharasma/'s} tenets.
- 3rd-level domain spell: Replace *animate dead* with *speak with dead*
::h3[Ancestors Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/86}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Acavna}, {faith/Anubis}, {faith/Ashava}, {faith/Bergelmir}, {faith/Fharaas}, {faith/Ghenshau}, {faith/Magrim}, {faith/Myr}, {faith/Osiris}, {faith/Pharasma}, {faith/Ragadahn}, {faith/Rhan-Tegoth}, {faith/Selket}, {faith/Shizuru}, {faith/The Lost Prince}, {faith/Tsukiyo}, {faith/Yhidothrus}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the ward against death power of the Repose domain.

>**Speak With Dead (Su):** At 8th level, as a standard action, you can ask one question of a dead creature as if using {spell/speak with dead}. The dead creature you are questioning does not gain a Will saving throw if your alignments are different. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to your cleric level.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 4th-{spell/rest eternal}, 6th-{spell/geas//quest}.
::h3[Psychopomp Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Balance/17}
**Associated Domains:** Death, Evil
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Pharasma}

**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the death's embrace ability of the {domain/Death} domain or the ward against death ability of the Repose domain. {family/Psychopomp/s} are a race of neutral outsiders.

>**Spirit Touch (Su):** At 6th level, as a swift action, you can give your natural weapons or any weapons you wield the {magic-enh/ghost touch} weapon special ability. You can use this power a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. These rounds need not be consecutive.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 3rd-{spell/chain of perdition}, 6th-{spell/planar ally} (psychopomps only), 8th-{spell/trap the soul}.
::h3[Souls Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/96}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Alazhra}, {faith/Anubis}, {faith/Cagnazzo}, {faith/Chamiaholom}, {faith/Chavazvug}, {faith/Corosbel}, {faith/Doloras}, {faith/Fharaas}, {faith/Fumeiyoshi}, {faith/Lorcan}, {faith/Magrim}, {faith/Naderi}, {faith/Osiris}, {faith/Ozranvial}, {faith/Pharasma}, {faith/Selket}, {faith/Tsukiyo}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the gentle rest power of the Repose domain.

>**Touch the Spirit World (Su):** With a touch, you can empower a weapon to affect incorporeal creatures. The weapon touched deals half damage to incorporeal creatures, or full damage if it is a magic weapon. This benefit lasts for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 3rd-{spell/animate dead}, 6th-{spell/antilife shell}, 9th-{spell/trap the soul}.
::h3[Variant Domain Powers]{jl}
{SOURCE Haunted Heroes Handbook}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.
#### Pharasma
{SOURCE Haunted Heroes Handbook/9}

The Lady of Graves seeks the destruction of undead, be they corporeal or manifested spirits. Inquisitors of Pharasma scour the world for signs of the undead, destroying such abominations on sight by means both traditional and esoteric in nature. As a result, most people come first to the church of Pharasma when seeking assistance against foul spirits. One unusual facet of Pharasma's faithful is their reluctance to excise non-undead spirits, such as demons or devils. Only the most altruistic of Pharasmin priests offer their services against possessing outsiders, as most faithful see battling such foes as being beyond their true calling.

**Exorcism of Undeath (Sp):** Once per day as a full-round action, you can try to end any possession spells or effects, or effects that directly exercise mental control over a creature, as long as the effect was caused by an undead creature. You must touch the affected creature (this requires a melee touch attack if the target is neither willing nor helpless) and use a vial of {eq-weapon/holy water} as a material component that is consumed as part of using this ability. The target must immediately attempt a new Will save against the original save DC of the controlling effect. If the save is successful, the possession effect immediately ends, as if the target had succeeded at its original saving throw. If the possessing force is a {template/ghost} or similar undead, it manifests adjacent to the target and is {misc/staggered} for 1 round.
This replaces the ward against death domain power of the Repose domain.

rune.name: Rune
description: ## Rune
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/47}

**Deities:** {faith/Benorus}, {faith/Bifrons}, {faith/Braismois}, {faith/Gaap}, {faith/Hastur}, {faith/Imot}, {faith/Irez}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Lissala}, {faith/Lissala (pre-Earthfall)}, {faith/Magdh}, {faith/Magrim}, {faith/Mephistopheles}, {faith/Mneoc}, {faith/Nalinivati}, {faith/Narakaas}, {faith/Nethys}, {faith/Onmyuza}, {faith/Sivanah}, {faith/Stygidvod}, {faith/Thoth}, {faith/Valmallos}, {faith/Ydajisk}
**Granted Powers:** In strange and eldritch runes you find potent magic. You gain {feat/Scribe Scroll} as a bonus feat.

**Blast Rune (Sp):** As a standard action, you can create a blast rune in any adjacent square. Any creature entering this square takes 1d6 points of damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess. This rune deals either acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage, decided when you create the rune. The rune is invisible and lasts a number of rounds equal to your cleric level or until discharged. You cannot create a blast rune in a square occupied by another creature. This rune counts as a 1st-level spell for the purposes of dispelling. It can be discovered with a DC 26 Perception skill check and disarmed with a DC 26 Disable Device skill check. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.

**Spell Rune (Sp):** At 8th level, you can attach another spell that you cast to one of your blast runes, causing that spell to affect the creature that triggers the rune, in addition to the damage. This spell must be of at least one level lower than the highest-level cleric spell you can cast and it must target one or more creatures. Regardless of the number of targets the spell can normally affect, it only affects the creature that triggers the rune.

**Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/erase}, 2nd-{spell/secret page}, 3rd-{spell/glyph of warding}, 4th-{spell/explosive runes}, 5th-{spell/lesser planar binding}, 6th-{spell/greater glyph of warding}, 7th-{spell/instant summons}, 8th-{spell/symbol of death}, 9th-{spell/teleportation circle}.
::h3[Language Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/92}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Bifrons}, {faith/Braismois}, {faith/Hastur}, {faith/Irez}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Lissala}, {faith/Lissala (pre-Earthfall)}, {faith/Mephistopheles}, {faith/Onmyuza}, {faith/Pavnuri}, {faith/Stygidvod}, {faith/Thoth}, {faith/Titivilus}, {faith/Vapula}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the spell rune power of the Rune domain.

>**Rune Shift (Su):** At 6th level, as a swift action, you can change the location of one of your blast runes. The rune must be within 30 feet. You can place the blast rune in any square adjacent to you, including one occupied by another creature.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/comprehend languages}, 2nd-{spell/share language}, 3rd-{spell/tongues}, 5th-{spell/telepathic bond}.
::h3[Legislation Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Heroes of the Streets/19}
**Associated Domains:** Law, Rune
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Abadar}, {faith/Asmodeus}, {faith/Dispater}, {faith/Lissala}, {faith/Winlas}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the touch of law power of the {domain/Law} domain or the blast rune power of the Rune domain.

>**Prohibition (Su):** As a standard action, you can command a creature within 30 feet to refrain from committing a particular action (including any referenced in the spell *forbid action*). If the creature performs the named action before the beginning of your next turn, it takes 1d6 points of damage + 1 point for every 2 cleric levels you possess and the effect ends. This is a language-dependent effect. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.

>If you have the spell rune domain power, you can attach a spell effect to the prohibition as if it were the spell rune domain ability; the spell takes effect if the creature performs the named action. This spell must be of at least 1 level lower than the highest-level cleric spell you can cast, and it must target one or more creatures. Regardless of the number of targets the spell can normally affect, it affects only the creature that triggers the rune. Attaching a spell in this way extends the duration of the prohibition by a number of rounds equal to the spell's level, or until it is discharged.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/forbid action}, 5th-{spell/greater forbid action}, 9th-{spell/mass hold monster}.
::h3[Wards Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/97}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Acavna}, {faith/Benorus}, {faith/Bifrons}, {faith/Gaap}, {faith/Hastur}, {faith/Irez}, {faith/Lissala}, {faith/Lissala (pre-Earthfall)}, {faith/Magdh}, {faith/Magrim}, {faith/Nalinivati}, {faith/Nethys}, {faith/Onmyuza}, {faith/Sivanah}, {faith/Thoth}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the spell rune power of the Rune domain.

>**Warding Rune (Su):** At 6th level, when a creature is damaged by your blast rune, it cannot attack you for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level unless it succeeds at a Will save, as per the spell {spell/sanctuary}. Using this ability is an immediate action when a creature triggers one of your blast runes. The ability does not prevent you from being attacked or affected by area of effect spells or abilities. You can use this ability once per day at 8th level, plus one additional time per day at 14th level and 20th level.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/arcane lock}, 4th-{spell/dimensional anchor}, 6th-{spell/guards and wards}.

scalykind.name: Scalykind
description: ## Scalykind
{SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Inner Sea World Guide/216;Pathfinder #37: Souls for Smuggler's Shiv/69;Gods and Magic/51}

**Deities:** {faith/Apep}, {faith/Apsu}, {faith/Ardad Lili}, {faith/Dahak}, {faith/Jalaijatali}, {faith/Nalinivati}, {faith/Ragadahn}, {faith/Rytara}, {faith/Sobek}, {faith/Teshallas}, {faith/Vois}, {faith/Vorasha}, {faith/Ydersius}, {faith/Yig}
**Granted Powers:** You are a true lord of reptiles, and your gaze can drive weak creatures into unconsciousness.

**Venomous Stare (Sp):** As a standard action, you can activate a gaze attack with a 30-foot range. This is an active gaze attack that can target a single creature within range. The target must make a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). Those that fail take 1d6 points of nonlethal damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess and are fascinated until the beginning of your next turn. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. This is a mind-affecting effect.

**Serpent Companion (Ex):** At 4th level, you gain the service of an {sidekick/animal companion}. Your effective druid level for this animal companion is equal to your cleric level - 2. You may choose either a {companion/viper} or a {companion/constrictor snake} as your companion.

**Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/magic fang}, 2nd-{spell/animal trance}, 3rd-{spell/greater magic fang}, 4th-{spell/poison}, 5th-{spell/animal growth} (reptiles only), 6th-{spell/eyebite}, 7th-{spell/creeping doom} (takes the form of Diminutive-sized reptiles), 8th-{spell/animal shapes} (reptiles only), 9th-{spell/shapechange}.
::h3[Dragon Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Inner Sea Gods/224;Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains/1;Champions of Purity/20}
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Apep}, {faith/Apsu}, {faith/Ardad Lili}, {faith/Dahak}, {faith/Draghignazzo}, {faith/Ragadahn}, {faith/Yig}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the serpent companion ability of the Scalykind domain.

>**Dragonbreath (Su):** At 4th level, you can use a breath weapon once per day as a standard action. When you gain this ability, choose what kind of damage your breath weapon deals: acid, cold, electricity, or fire. Once you make this choice, you can't change it later. Your breath weapon fills a 15-foot cone and deals 3d6 points of damage; this damage increases by 1d6 points at every even-numbered level you gain beyond 4th level. A creature hit by your dragonbreath attack can attempt a Reflex save (DC = 10 + half your class level + your Wisdom modifier) to take half damage. At 9th level, you can use this ability two times per day, and at 14th level, you can use it three times per day.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 3rd-{spell/draconic reservoir}, 4th-{spell/dragon's breath}, 6th-{spell/form of the dragon I}.
::h3[Saurian Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains/1;Inner Sea Gods/226}
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Sobek}, {faith/Ydersius}, {faith/Zevgavizeb}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the serpent companion ability of the Scalykind domain.

>**Dinosaur Companion (Ex):** At 4th level, you gain the service of a loyal animal companion. Your effective druid level for the purpose of this animal companion is equal to your class level - 2. You must choose a dinosaur as {ability/druid<your| companion>s}.

**Replacement Domain Spells:** 4th-{spell/summon nature's ally IV} ({monster/deinonychus} or {monster/pteranodon} only), 5th-{spell/beast shape III}, 7th-{spell/summon nature's ally VII} ({monster/brachiosaurus} or {monster/tyrannosaurus} only).
::h3[Venom Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Inner Sea Gods/227}
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Isph-Aun-Vuln}, {faith/Mazmezz}, {faith/Nergal}, {faith/Ragadahn}, {faith/Rytara}, {faith/Scarmiglione}, {faith/Vois}, {faith/Vorasha}, {faith/Yig}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the venomous stare power of the Scalykind domain.

>**Venomous Saliva (Su):** Just as certain serpents can spray poison from their fangs, as a swift action, you can spit a gout of life-stealing venom onto a weapon you are wielding. The poison lasts for 1 minute or until you make an attack with that weapon that injures a foe.
>::aff[Life-Stealing Venom]{iconP poison type=injury dcF dcLev=class dcYou dcMod=Wis freqR=3 effCon=1 cure1}
>You can use the venomous saliva ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 2nd-{spell/pernicious poison}, 6th-{spell/cloudkill}.

strength.name: Strength
description: ## Strength
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/47}

**Deities:** {faith/Abhoth}, {faith/Alocer}, {faith/Ananshea}, {faith/Arlachramas}, {faith/Arshea}, {faith/Ashukharma}, {faith/Ayrzul}, {faith/Baphomet}, {faith/Bohga}, {faith/Cayden Cailean}, {faith/Ceyannan}, {faith/Charg}, {faith/Cihua Couatl}, {faith/Dranngvit}, {faith/Ealdeez}, {faith/Falayna}, {faith/Geryon}, {faith/Gorum}, {faith/Guyuku}, {faith/Haagenti}, {faith/Hadregash}, {faith/Haggakal}, {faith/Iapholi}, {faith/Imbrex}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Kazutal}, {faith/Kols}, {faith/Kostchtchie}, {faith/Kurgess}, {faith/Lamashtu}, {faith/Lanishra}, {faith/Llamolaek}, {faith/Malacoda}, {faith/Marishi}, {faith/Minderhal}, {faith/Myr}, {faith/Nameless}, {faith/Neshen}, {faith/Nightripper}, {faith/Nulgreth}, {faith/Ondisso}, {faith/Ruapceras}, {faith/Sabnach}, {faith/Saloc}, {faith/Sicva}, {faith/Sobek}, {faith/Szuriel}, {faith/Trudd}, {faith/Urazra}, {faith/Urgathoa}, {faith/Uruskreil}, {faith/Uskyeria}, {faith/Xoveron}, {faith/Yamatsumi}, {faith/Zevgavizeb}, {faith/Zipacna}
**Granted Powers:** In strength and brawn there is truth - your faith gives you incredible might and power.

**Strength Surge (Sp):** As a standard action, you can touch a creature to give it great strength. For 1 round, the target gains an enhancement bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) to melee attacks, combat maneuver checks that rely on Strength, Strength-based skills, and Strength checks. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.

**Might of the Gods (Su):** At 8th level, you can add your cleric level as an enhancement bonus to your Strength score for a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. This bonus only applies on Strength checks and Strength-based skill checks. These rounds do not need to be consecutive.

**Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/enlarge person}, 2nd-{spell/bull's strength}, 3rd-{spell/magic vestment}, 4th-{spell/spell immunity}, 5th-{spell/righteous might}, 6th-{spell/stoneskin}, 7th-{spell/grasping hand}, 8th-{spell/clenched fist}, 9th-{spell/crushing hand}.
::h3[Competition Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Heroes of the Streets/18}
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Cayden Cailean}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Kurgess}, {faith/Marishi}, {faith/Trudd}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the strength surge power of the Strength domain.

>**Athletic Exploit (Su):** As a swift action, you gain the ability to overcome physical obstacles with ease. Until the beginning of your next turn, you halve your armor check penalty when attempting Acrobatics, Climb, Escape Artist, and Swim skill checks, and you gain a bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) on such skill checks.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/jump}, 3rd-{spell/greater animal aspect}, 6th-{spell/greater heroism}.
::h3[Ferocity Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/90}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Abhoth}, {faith/Alocer}, {faith/Ananshea}, {faith/Ayrzul}, {faith/Baphomet}, {faith/Bohga}, {faith/Cayden Cailean}, {faith/Charg}, {faith/Cihua Couatl}, {faith/Ealdeez}, {faith/Geryon}, {faith/Gorum}, {faith/Guyuku}, {faith/Hadregash}, {faith/Haggakal}, {faith/Kostchtchie}, {faith/Lamashtu}, {faith/Llamolaek}, {faith/Malacoda}, {faith/Minderhal}, {faith/Nightripper}, {faith/Nulgreth}, {faith/Sabnach}, {faith/Sicva}, {faith/Sobek}, {faith/Szuriel}, {faith/Urazra}, {faith/Urgathoa}, {faith/Uskyeria}, {faith/Xoveron}, {faith/Zevgavizeb}, {faith/Zipacna}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the strength surge power of the Strength domain.

>**Ferocious Strike (Su):** Whenever you make a melee attack, you can designate that attack as a ferocious strike. If the attack hits, it deals additional damage equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1). You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 3rd-{spell/rage}, 6th-{spell/mass bull's strength}.
::h3[Fist Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Balance/17}
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Gorum}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Yamatsumi}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the strength surge ability of the Strength domain.
>**Wooden Fist (Su):** This ability acts as the {domain/Plant} domain power of the same name.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/true strike}, 3rd-{spell/greater magic fang}, 4th-{spell/force punch}.
::h3[Resolve Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/95}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Abhoth}, {faith/Alocer}, {faith/Arlachramas}, {faith/Ashukharma}, {faith/Baphomet}, {faith/Bohga}, {faith/Cayden Cailean}, {faith/Cihua Couatl}, {faith/Dranngvit}, {faith/Falayna}, {faith/Geryon}, {faith/Gorum}, {faith/Haagenti}, {faith/Iapholi}, {faith/Imbrex}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Kols}, {faith/Kurgess}, {faith/Lanishra}, {faith/Marishi}, {faith/Minderhal}, {faith/Myr}, {faith/Nameless}, {faith/Neshen}, {faith/Ondisso}, {faith/Ruapceras}, {faith/Sobek}, {faith/Trudd}, {faith/Urazra}, {faith/Uruskreil}, {faith/Yamatsumi}, {faith/Zevgavizeb}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the might of the gods power of the Strength domain.

>**Bestow Resolve (Su):** At 8th level, you can bless creatures with the boldness of your deity. You can bestow a number of {rule/temporary hit points} equal to your level + your Wisdom modifier to all allies within 20 feet. The temporary hit points remain for 1 minute. You can use this ability once per day at 8th level, plus one additional time per day for every 4 levels you possess beyond 8th.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/bless}, 6th-{spell/heroes' feast}.
::h3[Self-Realization Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/26}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
**Associated Domains:** Liberation, Strength
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Arshea}, {faith/Falayna}, {faith/Haagenti}, {faith/Irori}, {faith/Kurgess}, {faith/Scal}, {faith/Shei}, {faith/Urgathoa}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the liberation power of the {domain/Liberation} domain or the strength surge ability of the Strength domain.

**Perfected Form (Su):** You maintain an unshakable sense of who you are, and no force can compel you to be anything else. You gain a +1 sacred (if your patron is good or neutral) or profane (if your patron is evil) bonus on saving throws against polymorph, petrification, and transmutation effects. This bonus increases by 1 for every 5 cleric levels you have (maximum +5). Once per day when you succeed at a saving throw against such an effect, you can gain a surge of self-confidence as an immediate action that grants you a number of temporary hit points equal to your cleric level and a +2 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws; both effects last for 1 minute.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 4th-{spell/paragon surge} (always matches your actual race), 6th-{spell/primal scream}, 7th-{spell/transformation}.

sun.name: Sun
description: ## Sun
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/47}

**Deities:** {faith/Aldinach}, {faith/Azathoth}, {faith/Easivra}, {faith/Horus}, {faith/Iaozrael}, {faith/Iomedae}, {faith/Jaidi}, {faith/Jerishall}, {faith/Keltheald}, {faith/Khepri}, {faith/Lalaci}, {faith/Muronna}, {faith/Nurgal}, {faith/Pharimia}, {faith/Ra}, {faith/Sarenrae}, {faith/Shizuru}, {faith/Skode}
**Granted Powers:** You see truth in the pure and burning light of the sun, and can call upon its blessing or wrath to work great deeds.

**Sun's Blessing (Su):** Whenever you channel positive energy to harm undead creatures, add your cleric level to the damage dealt. Undead do not add their {umr/channel resistance} to their saves when you channel positive energy.

**Nimbus of Light (Su):** At 8th level, you can emit a 30-foot nimbus of light for a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. This acts as a {spell/daylight} spell. In addition, undead within this radius take an amount of damage equal to your cleric level each round that they remain inside the nimbus. Spells and spell-like abilities with the darkness descriptor are automatically dispelled if brought inside this nimbus. These rounds do not need to be consecutive.

**Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/endure elements}, 2nd-{spell/heat metal}, 3rd-{spell/searing light}, 4th-{spell/fire shield}, 5th-{spell/flame strike}, 6th-{spell/fire seeds}, 7th-{spell/sunbeam}, 8th-{spell/sunburst}, 9th-{spell/prismatic sphere}.
::h3[Day Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/88}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Easivra}, {faith/Horus}, {faith/Iaozrael}, {faith/Iomedae}, {faith/Jaidi}, {faith/Keltheald}, {faith/Khepri}, {faith/Muronna}, {faith/Nurgal}, {faith/Ra}, {faith/Sarenrae}, {faith/Shizuru}, {faith/Skode}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the nimbus of light power of the Sun domain.

>**Day's Resurgence (Su):** At 8th level, you can restore a single creature as if it had just completed 8 hours of rest. It takes 10 minutes to use this power. If the use of this power is disrupted, it must be restarted, but it is not lost. At the end of the 10 minutes, a single willing creature that you have touched regains hit points as if it had rested for the night and may make new saving throws against effects that require a save once per day. The target does not suffer any negative effects if such saving throws are failed, but success counts toward removing the affliction (if possible). This ability does not allow a target to prepare spells an additional time per day. You can use this ability once per day at 8th level, plus one additional time per day for every 2 levels beyond 8th.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 2nd-{spell/continual flame}, 3rd-{spell/daylight}.
::h3[Light Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/93}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Aldinach}, {faith/Easivra}, {faith/Horus}, {faith/Iaozrael}, {faith/Iomedae}, {faith/Jaidi}, {faith/Keltheald}, {faith/Lalaci}, {faith/Pharimia}, {faith/Ra}, {faith/Sarenrae}, {faith/Shizuru}, {faith/Skode}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the sun's blessing power of the Sun domain.

>**Blinding Flash (Su):** As a standard action, you can emit a flash of light from your holy symbol or divine focus. The most powerful light emanates out 20 feet from you. Creatures with fewer Hit Dice than your cleric level within this area are blinded for 1d4 rounds unless they succeed at a Fortitude save. All creatures in this area are {misc/dazzled} for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1). You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/faerie fire}, 3rd-{spell/daylight}.
::h3[Revelation Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Champions of Purity/21}
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Iomedae}, {faith/Sarenrae}, {faith/Shizuru}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the sun's blessing ability of the Sun domain.

>**Guided Eyes (Su):** Perception is always a class skill for you. In addition, whenever you make a skill check to see through a disguise or find something that is hidden or concealed, you gain a +4 sacred bonus on the check.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/detect secret doors}, 2nd-{spell/see invisibility}, 3rd-{spell/banish seeming}, 5th-true seeing
::h3[Thirst Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Divine Anthology/26}
This subdomain requires the {trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha} trait to access.
**Associated Deities:** {faith/Aldinach}, {faith/Lalaci}, {faith/Nurgal}, {faith/Sarenrae}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted powers replace the sun's blessing power and alter the nimbus of light power of the Sun domain.

>**Wilting Glare (Su):** As a standard action, you can leach moisture and vitality from a living, corporeal creature you can see within 30 feet. The target takes an amount of nonlethal damage equal to 1d6 + 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have and becomes fatigued until the beginning of your next turn (Fortitude negates). Plant creatures and those with the aquatic or water subtype take lethal damage from this ability, and they are fatigued for a number of rounds equal to your Wisdom modifier. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
>**Withering Nimbus (Su):** This ability functions as the nimbus of light domain ability, but it damages plants and creatures with the aquatic or water subtype, not undead.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 3rd-{spell/cup of dust}, 9th-{spell/horrid wilting}.

travel.name: Travel
description: ## Travel
{SOURCE PRPG Core Rulebook/47}

**Deities:** {faith/Abadar}, {faith/Aegirran}, {faith/Alazhra}, {faith/Apsu}, {faith/Barbatos}, {faith/Barzahk}, {faith/Cagnazzo}, {faith/Cayden Cailean}, {faith/Chimon}, {faith/Count Ranalc}, {faith/Desna}, {faith/Dranngvit}, {faith/Eligos}, {faith/Elion}, {faith/Folca}, {faith/Geon}, {faith/Gruhastha}, {faith/Hanspur}, {faith/Hataam}, {faith/Hathor}, {faith/Jaidz}, {faith/Kelizandri}, {faith/Keltheald}, {faith/Kofusachi}, {faith/Kurgess}, {faith/Matravash}, {faith/Morrobahn}, {faith/Ng}, {faith/Nocticula (Redeemed)}, {faith/Onos}, {faith/Pavnuri}, {faith/Pharimia}, {faith/Ptah}, {faith/Roqorolos}, {faith/Rowdrosh}, {faith/Sinashakti}, {faith/Socothbenoth}, {faith/Sun Wukong}, {faith/The Pale Horse}, {faith/Tolc}, {faith/Wadjet}, {faith/Yog-Sothoth}, {faith/Zarongel}, {faith/Zohls}
**Granted Powers:** You are an explorer and find enlightenment in the simple joy of travel, be it by foot or conveyance or magic. Increase your base speed by 10 feet.

**Agile Feet (Su):** As a free action, you can gain increased mobility for 1 round. For the next round, you ignore all {rule/difficult terrain} and do not take any penalties for moving through it. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.

**Dimensional Hop (Sp):** At 8th level, you can teleport up to 10 feet per cleric level per day as a move action. This teleportation must be used in 5-foot increments and such movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. You must have line of sight to your destination to use this ability. You can bring other willing creatures with you, but you must expend an equal amount of distance for each creature brought.

**Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/longstrider}, 2nd-{spell/locate object}, 3rd-{spell/fly}, 4th-{spell/dimension door}, 5th-{spell/teleport}, 6th-{spell/find the path}, 7th-{spell/greater teleport}, 8th-{spell/phase door}, 9th-{spell/astral projection}.
::h3[Exploration Subdomain]{jl}
{SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/90}

**Associated Deities:** {faith/Aegirran}, {faith/Apsu}, {faith/Cayden Cailean}, {faith/Chimon}, {faith/Count Ranalc}, {faith/Desna}, {faith/Dranngvit}, {faith/Eligos}, {faith/Elion}, {faith/Folca}, {faith/Hanspur}, {faith/Hathor}, {faith/Jaidz}, {faith/Kelizandri}, {faith/Keltheald}, {faith/Kofusachi}, {faith/Morrobahn}, {faith/Ng}, {faith/Nocticula (Redeemed)}, {faith/Onos}, {faith/Pharimia}, {faith/Quindiovatos}, {faith/Sinashakti}, {faith/Socothbenoth}, {faith/Sun Wukong}, {faith/Tolc}, {faith/Wadjet}, {faith/Yog-Sothoth}, {faith/Zohls}
**Replacement Power:** The following granted power replaces the agile feet power of the Travel domain.

>**Door Sight (Su):** You can lay your hand upon any surface and see what is on the other side, as if using {spell/clairvoyance}. Using this power takes 1 minute, during which time you must be touching the surface you want to see through. You can keep looking for as long as 10 minutes with each use of this power, but must touch the surface and take no other action the entire time. The surface cannot be thicker than 6 inches plus 1 inch per cleric level you possess. You can use this power a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier.
**Replacement Domain Spells:** 1st-{spell/expeditious retreat}, 4th-{spell/locate creature}, 9th-{spell/world wave}.
